title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 393.755 - Bonds may be repurchased
text:
393.755.  Bonds may be repurchased. — A commission shall have power to purchase bonds out of any funds available therefor and to hold, pledge, cancel or resell such bonds, subject to and in accordance with any agreements with the holders.
(L. 1978 H.B. 1126 § 12) 
Effective 12-07-78
